name: Min Stack
description: Design a stack that supports push, pop, top, and retrieving the minimum element in constant time. All operations must run in O(1).
constraints: -2^31 <= val <= 2^31 - 1. pop, top, getMin always called on non-empty stacks. At most 3 * 10^4 calls.

performance.stress_intent: deep stacks punish rescanning the whole stack for minima
